
  parameter HALF_CLOCK_PERIOD = 2;
  parameter CLOCK_PERIOD = HALF_CLOCK_PERIOD * 2;

  // clock
  always begin
      ap_clk = 1'b0;
      #HALF_CLOCK_PERIOD;
      ap_clk = 1'b1;
      #HALF_CLOCK_PERIOD;
  end

  // axis signals
  always @(posedge ap_clk) begin
    if (kernel_started) begin


    tapa::istream(
        axis_a_tdata_unpacked_next,
        axis_a_tvalid_next,
        axis_a_tready,
        "a_s"
    );

    axis_a_tdata_unpacked <= axis_a_tdata_unpacked_next;
    axis_a_tvalid <= axis_a_tvalid_next;



    tapa::ostream(
        axis_b_tdata_unpacked,
        axis_b_tready_next,
        axis_b_tvalid,
        "b_s"
    );

    axis_b_tready <= axis_b_tready_next;


    end
  end



    assign {axis_a_tlast, axis_a_tdata} =
        packed_uint33_t'(axis_a_tdata_unpacked);



    assign axis_b_tdata_unpacked =
        unpacked_uint65_t'
            ({axis_b_tlast, axis_b_tdata});



  initial begin
    // reset the DUT
    ap_rst_n = 1'b0;
    #(CLOCK_PERIOD*1000);

    // enable the DUT
    ap_rst_n = 1'b1;
    #(CLOCK_PERIOD*100);


    s_axi_aw_write <= 1; s_axi_aw_din <= 'h10; s_axi_w_write <= 1; s_axi_w_din <= 123456789 & REG_MASK_32_BIT; @(posedge ap_clk);

    s_axi_aw_write <= 1; s_axi_aw_din <= 'h14; s_axi_w_write <= 1; s_axi_w_din <= (123456789 >> 32) & REG_MASK_32_BIT; @(posedge ap_clk);

    // start the DUT
    s_axi_aw_write <= 1;
    s_axi_aw_din <= 'h00;
    s_axi_w_write <= 1;
    s_axi_w_din <= 1;
    @(posedge ap_clk);

    // stop writing control signal
    s_axi_aw_write <= 0;
    s_axi_w_write <= 0;
    @(posedge ap_clk);

    kernel_started <= 1;
    @(posedge ap_clk);

    // start polling ap_done
    #(CLOCK_PERIOD*1000);
    s_axi_control_arvalid <= 1'b1 & s_axi_control_arready;
    @(posedge ap_clk);

  end

  // polling on ap_done
  always @(posedge ap_clk) begin
    if (~ap_rst_n) begin
    end
    else begin
      if (s_axi_control_rvalid) begin
        if (s_axi_control_rdata[1]) begin

          axi_ram_mem_dump_mem <= 1;

          #(CLOCK_PERIOD*100)
          $finish;
        end
      end
    end
  end
